releases.body:
## What's Changed
* Add agents and config endpoint by @ashish-spext in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/1
* Ankit/add agents by @ankit-v2-3 in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/2
* fix: prompt clip by @ankit-v2-3 in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/3
* cleanup fe by @0xrohitgarg in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/4
* bump videodb-chat by @0xrohitgarg in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/5
* Agents: Add stream video agent, minor update in sample agent. by @ashish-spext in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/6
* API: Add session delete endpoint. by @ashish-spext in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/8
* Ankit/add documentation by @ankit-v2-3 in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/9
* Added name parm for upload by @codeAshu in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/10
* bump videodb-chat to 0.0.5 & add keyboard shortcut by @0xrohitgarg in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/11
* Ankit/refactor by @ankit-v2-3 in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/7
* feat: add search data and shot data by @ankit-v2-3 in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/13
* activate nvm on run, and dont set installed nvm as default in setup by @0xrohitgarg in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/12
* Ashu/fix readme by @codeAshu in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/16
* improved readme for docs by @codeAshu in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/17
* Ankit/add documentation by @ankit-v2-3 in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/15
* build: upgrade videodb by @ankit-v2-3 in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/20
* Summarize reasoning engine response and misc by @ashish-spext in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/19
* Slack agent to send message to slack by @codeAshu in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/21
* Ankit/add documentation by @ankit-v2-3 in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/18
* Ankit/add claude by @ankit-v2-3 in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/22
* subtitle agent with VideoDB Timeline & OpenAI translation by @0xrohitgarg in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/14
* Add missing llm in slack_agent by @ashish-spext in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/23
* Name change by @ashish-spext in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/24
* Rename backend project name by @ashish-spext in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/25
* Fix location of director's dir by @ashish-spext in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/26
* update logo by @0xrohitgarg in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/28
* Final Cut message and status update by @ashish-spext in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/29
* Fix RE Final Response by @ashish-spext in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/31
* fix: handle llm error, bump videodb chat by @ankit-v2-3 in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/32
* Ashu/fix readme by @codeAshu in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/33
* Ankit/add issue template by @ankit-v2-3 in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/34
* Update README.md by @codeAshu in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/38
* Add actions for doc deployment and setup, README.md update etc. by @ashish-spext in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/39
* Minor update README.md by @ashish-spext in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/41
* Ankit/fix config check by @ankit-v2-3 in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/44
* Add local upload support and improve playlist exception by @ashish-spext in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/46
* Update README.md with Railway URL and minor spacing by @ashish-spext in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/47
* ProfanityRemoverAgent: Improve prompt and fix status bug by @ashish-spext in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/48
* Improve Frontend Makefile run command and Backend setup by @0xrohitgarg in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/50
* 54 add vision and multimodal search capability to prompt clip agent by @ankit-v2-3 in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/55
* Add Python 3.13 Support to Forked openai-function-calling and Replace Original Package by @0xrohitgarg in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/60
* Feat: add keyword search, scene index by @ankit-v2-3 in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/58
* add dubbing agent & elevenlabs tools by @0xrohitgarg in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/59
* fix: edit url by @ankit-v2-3 in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/63
* Add Meme agent by @ankit-v2-3 in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/68
* Ankit/add composio agent by @ankit-v2-3 in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/71
* Bump `openai-function-calling`  by @0xrohitgarg in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/75
* Ankit/videodb llm proxy by @ankit-v2-3 in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/78
* Send download link and rename summary agent by @ashish-spext in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/77
* docs: update setup.sh by @ankit-v2-3 in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/81
* Ashu/fix launch v0 by @codeAshu in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/76
* Editing Agent, Audio Generation, Video Generation & Text to Movie Agent by @0xrohitgarg in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/67
* use default llm in text to movie by @0xrohitgarg in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/86
* backend support for upload modal by @0xrohitgarg in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/89
* bump openai 1.55.3 by @0xrohitgarg in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/91
* add support for configurable sqlite db path by @0xrohitgarg in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/93
* Change docs domain name by @ashish-spext in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/95
* Ashu/fix launch v1 by @codeAshu in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/96
* Improved prompts of the system and agents by @codeAshu in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/94

## New Contributors
* @ashish-spext made their first contribution in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/1
* @ankit-v2-3 made their first contribution in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/2
* @0xrohitgarg made their first contribution in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/4
* @codeAshu made their first contribution in https://github.com/video-db/Director/pull/10

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/video-db/Director/commits/First

readme_html:
🧐 What is The Director?

Think of Director as ChatGPT for videos. It is a framework to build video agents that can reason through complex video tasks like search, editing, compilation, generation etc & instantly stream the results.

For example, a simple natural language command like: Upload this video and send the highlights to my Slack, sets everything in motion - Director’s reasoning will orchestrate the different agents intelligently to complete the task for you.

Built on top of VideoDB’s ‘video-as-data’ infrastructure, Director enables you to:

  • Summarize videos in seconds.
  • Search for specific moments.
  • Create clips instantly.
  • Integrate top GenAI projects and APIs and create and edit content instantly.
  • Add overlays, extract frames, and much more.

Built with flexibility in mind, Director is perfect for developers, creators, and teams looking to harness AI to simplify media workflows and unlock new possibilities. 📺 Watch: Intro video

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/33e0e7b4-9eb2-4a26-8274-f96c2c1c3a48

⭐️ Key Features

🤖 20+ pre-built video agents that you can customize to

  • Summarize videos in seconds.
  • Generate full movies with voiceovers from a script.
  • Search and index your media library.
  • Organize and clip your content effortlessly.
  • Dub and edit your audio and video with ease.
  • Translate and add subtitle in any language.
  • ....and a whole lot more >>

🎨 A New Way to Interact

Experience a sleek, chat-based interface with built-in video playback and intuitive controls. It’s like having a personal assistant for your media.

🥣 A mixing bowl of your GenAI APIs

Connect seamlessly with powerful AI tools like LLMs, databases, and GenAI APIs, while VideoDB ensures your video infrastructure is reliable and scalable for cloud storage, indexing and streaming your content effortlessly.

🧩 Customizable and Flexible

Easily add new agents and tools to your workflow. Whether you want to run it locally or on your cloud, The Director adapts to your needs.

😎 Agent Examples

  1. Highlight Creator: link
  2. Text to Movie: link
  3. Video Search: link

⚙️ Architecture Overview

Director's architecture brings together:

  • Backend Reasoning Engine: Handles workflows and decision-making. Checkout the backend folder in director codebase.

  • Chat-Based UI: Engage with your media library conversationally. Check videodb-chat for the source code.

  • Video Player: Advanced playback and interaction tools. Check videodb-player for the details about the multi platform video player.

  • Collection View: Organize and browse your media effortlessly.

🧠 Reasoning Engine

At the heart of The Director is its Reasoning Engine, a powerful core that drives intelligent decision-making and dynamic workflows. It acts as the brain behind the agents, enabling them to process commands, interact with data, and deliver meaningful outputs.

How It Works

  • Contextual Understanding: The engine analyzes user inputs and maintains context, ensuring smooth and coherent interactions with agents.
  • Dynamic Agent Orchestration: Based on the user’s needs, it identifies and activates the right agents to complete tasks efficiently.
  • Modular Processing: Tasks are broken into smaller steps, allowing agents to collaborate and deliver accurate results in real time.

Key Capabilities

  • Multi-Agent Coordination: Seamlessly integrates multiple agents to handle complex workflows, such as summarizing, editing, and searching videos.
  • Real-Time Updates: Provides live progress and feedback as tasks are being completed.
  • Extensible Design: Easily adaptable to include custom logic or connect to external APIs for more advanced capabilities.

See It in Action

The Reasoning Engine works in tandem with the chat-based UI, making video interaction intuitive and efficient. For example:

  • Input: "Create a clip of the funniest scene in this video and share it on Slack."
  • Output: The engine orchestrates upload, scene detection, clipping, and sharing agents to deliver results seamlessly. Watch the video here

For a closer look, check out the detailed architecture diagram below:

🏃 Getting Started

Prerequisites

  • Python 3.9 or higher
  • Node.js 22.8.0 or higher
  • npm

Installation

1. Clone the repository:

git clone https://github.com/video-db/Director.git
cd Director

2. Run the setup script:

./setup.sh

This script will:

  • Install Node.js 22.8.0 using nvm
  • Install Python and pip
  • Set up virtual environments for both frontend and backend.

3. Configure the environment variables:

Edit the .env files to add your API keys and other configuration options.

Supported platforms:

  • Mac
  • Linux
  • Windows (WSL)

💬 Running the Application

To start both the backend and frontend servers:

make run

  • Backend: http://127.0.0.1:8000

  • Frontend: http://127.0.0.1:8080

For specific tasks:

  • Backend only: make run-be

  • Frontend only: make run-fe

📘 Creating a New Agent

Checkout hosted documentation at https://docs.director.videodb.io

To create a new agent in Director, follow these steps:

  1. Copy the template: Duplicate sample_agent.py in Director/backend/director/agents/ and rename it.

  2. Update class details:

    • Rename the class.
    • Update agent_name and description

  3. Implement logic:

    • Update parameters and docstring
    • Implement your agent's logic
    • Update the run() method.

  4. Handle output and status updates:

    • Use appropriate content types (TextContent, VideoContent, ImageContent, SearchResultContent)
    • Update self.output_message.actions for progress indicators
    • Use push_update() to emit progress events
    • Set content status (progress, success, error) and messages

  5. Implement error handling:

    • Set error status and messages if issues occur

  6. Finalize the response:

    • Call self.output_message.publish() to emit final state and persist session
    • Return an AgentResponse with result, message, and data

  7. Register the agent:

    • Import your new agent class in Director/backend/director/handler.py
    • Add it to the self.agents list in ChatHandler

Remember to consider creating reusable tools if your agent's functionality could be shared across multiple agents.

📖 Documentation

Checkout hosted documentation at https://docs.director.videodb.io

Serve Locally

To serve the documentation on port 9000:

source backend/venv/bin/activate  
make install-be
mkdocs serve -a localhost:9000

To build the documentation:

mkdocs build

🤝 Contributing

We welcome integrations from projects that can make video workflows easy and increase capabilities of the projects. Please check issues and discussions for details.

Any contributions you make are greatly appreciated. Here's the process:

  1. Fork the Project
  2. Create your Feature Branch (git checkout -b feature/AmazingFeature)
  3. Commit your Changes (git commit -m 'Add some AmazingFeature')
  4. Push to the Branch (git push origin feature/AmazingFeature)
  5. Open a Pull Request
